## Validation Plan

- [ ] Add or update registry entries when needed.
- [ ] Add or update routing fixtures when routing behavior changes.
- [ ] Add or update codegen benchmarks when implementation expectations change.
- [ ] Run the full validation suite before pull request handoff.

## Boundary Check

- [ ] Does not install `src/` or raw registry content as runtime output.
- [ ] Does not add personal asset mappings or toolbox mappings.
